Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Eithan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan has blond hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan uses an Enforcer technique to drift slowly to the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan's clothes are expensive white shadesilk imported from the west.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan uses webs of his power to gather information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan uses an Enforcer binding to launch himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan possesses a power inherited from his father's line.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan drinks a liquid that tastes like distilled poison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan refers to Lindon as 'elder brother'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan claims he can see the present.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan possesses superior awareness that allows him to know everything within range of his spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan wears white-and-blue robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan is from the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan's clan organizes street sweepers in Blackflame City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan gave the marble a curious glance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan possesses thousand eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan is looking for promising recruits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan can tear metal with his bare hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan can approach without being felt due to a collar's effect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan uses wrought iron fabric scissors as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan's breathing technique almost killed Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan is a yellow-haired man who has helped Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan is pleased with Lindon's answer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan stared at Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan noted that Lindon's throat was not as far gone as he had previously thought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan observed Lindon's transition to Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan is a yellow-haired man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan sits on a step and fiddles with his thumbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan is a sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan is Eithan Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan is an Underlord in service of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan is the heir to the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan Arelius reached the stage of Underlord at a young age.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Eithan Arelius is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Eithan considers Lindon a gamble.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Eithan is a person who will take Lindon away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Eithan Arelius is an Underlord who gave Lindon instructions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Eithan once locked Lindon in a stone ruin alone for two weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan Arelius took Lindon in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan wears a teal outer robe embroidered with golden fish.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan grew up on a training course similar to the one described.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan carries a lantern containing a burning star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan is facing a crisis.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan instructs Lindon to bring his second core up to Iron and brush up on his Soulsmithing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan allowed Gesha and Lindon to look at the scripts and constructs of the Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan can fill all four crystals in seconds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan notes that all cycling methods have tradeoffs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan advises Lindon to avoid wearing his ring while practicing the technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan's word as an Underlord convinced families to allow Cassias and Jing's marriage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan has high standards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan is considered the eleventh strongest of the Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan is showing Lindon different Paths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan is Lindon's adopted brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan spent most of his childhood in Blackflame City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan is a friend of Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan has adopted Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan has a spectral gray mass of soulfire hovering in his spirit above his core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan can find more soulfire fuel due to his bloodline's sense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Long's actions might have done Eithan Arelius a favor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan is a teacher to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan uses scissors as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan has a detection web.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan has placed winning bets before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan Arelius stumbled through a portal to the other side of the world six years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan beamed at Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan said he could have directed more soldiers to stop Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan suggested that cracking open her master's Remnant was the fastest way to Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan opened a temple at the top of a mountain four months ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Cassias gave up his position in the Arelius family to Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan has been monitoring Lindon as promised.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan allotted Lindon six weeks for the Trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan left Cassias in charge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan has returned to the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan Arelius has disciples challenging the Blackflame Trials.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan uses the Hollow Armor technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan has Copper sight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan has an Arelius bloodline legacy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan has two students.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan taught Lindon a cycling technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan is not in the city of Serpent's Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan Arelius is the youngest Underlord in the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan is a character who uses a broom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan is an Underlord whose power was unveiled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Eithan is ranked eleventh among active Lords in the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Eithan has extraordinary senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Eithan has a massive depth of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan Arelius held scissors against Jai Daishou's throat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Eithan Arelius was gone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Eithan claims to have killed an Underlord.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Eithan Arelius is a person whose handwriting was found in the Deepwalker Ape's prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Eithan wraps his core in a veil to mask his power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan Arelius is a person the narrator has felt rage against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan Arelius has a tiny blue spirit on his head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan painted a picture of a tall, lonely mountain with a flat summit and an ancient stone building.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan told Lindon that he does not have a Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan uses black scissors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan was the primary target of the Skysworn Underlord's technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — In Lindon's spiritual sight, Eithan glowed in a sun of green wind aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan released a pulse of pure madra from his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan is the second-ranked Underlord on these shores.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan used pure madra from his fist to strike Naru Gwei in the chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan is a character who emits a wave of mostly colorless and blue-white madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan entered the room holding a pure white knife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan states that the timing of an event depends on whether a Dreadgod is coming to kill everyone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan is located below the house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan is wounded by a red hook in his shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan uses a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan sealed Yerin's belt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan might know a way to make someone a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan is currently fighting Underlords and emissaries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan has been recalled to a secret location by order of the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan can generate three or four top-grade scales a day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan was traveling to the capital on a private cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan is a temporary Skysworn officer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan is an Underlord and the Patriarch of a great family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan has hinted at a way to remove the parasite from Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan Arelius taught Lindon something.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan is at a fortress of death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan trained Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan is Cassias's Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan saw the Blood Shadow as an opportunity for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan believes the strong write the rules.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan touched Yerin with a marble.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan's name provides a level of protection for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan has been toying with an idea for the last few weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan is the only person who would ask questions about Renfei's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan intends to deal with Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan talks about tiger-chasing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon thanked Eithan for the Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan led Lindon to the Bloodforged Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan warned Lindon that others might kill him to pull his cycling technique from his Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan is mentioned regarding the depth of cores during advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan Arelius uses soulfire to reinforce constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan Arelius carries a blue umbrella of waxed fabric.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan Arelius is acting on behalf of the Emperor of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan uses a folded umbrella as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan remarks that everything ends.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan is a person Yerin cannot catch up to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan is expected at the Emperor's audience hall.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan has a disciple who is described as a young Blackflame contracted to a sacred turtle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan is skilled in veils.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan reached out to lay a hand on Bai Rou.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan mentions that Skysworn require an assignment to complete squad registration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan offers the choice of secret missions for the Empire or training to reach Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan possesses a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan uses a void key to store and retrieve items.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan is the one who commissioned Lezaar to craft a specific pill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan was ousted as Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan uses a scripted fire-starter to light his pipe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan is teaching Lindon techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan wears Skysworn armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan was the Patriarch for the Blackflame branch of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan leads a pack of young Truegolds in emerald armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan is Lindon's master.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan had a sixteen-step plan for perfecting Lindon as a Gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan leads Lindon to unclaimed natural treasure deposits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan told Lindon and Yerin that many potential Underlords fail to realize their true revelation because they lack enough soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan serves either the Arelius family or the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan is duty-bound to a scouting mission given by the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan is present during Lindon and Yerin's conversation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan Arelius has two apprentices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan led Lindon through the massive camp outside the city walls to Fisher Gesha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan is a character who interacts with Lindon and Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan intends to rob the Emperor's vaults.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan is expected to return with the Arelius technique library.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan is a person Lindon fears losing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan was chatting with Naru Saeya on the cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan and Naru Saeya were serving as navigators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan is radiating power to slow the approach of enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan was located near the propulsion constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan was pouring his madra into the ship's propulsion constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan Arelius built a strangely excellent foundation.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan is competing in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan warned Lindon to keep his Jade cycling technique a secret.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan Arelius has cores like deep lakes and a lifeline like a thousand-year ancestral tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan Arelius achieved perfect scores on all mental tests.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan is Yerin's opponent in the Skysworn practice arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan wears an intricate many-layered ensemble of red with patterns of gold stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan sensed Dross's presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan is a person in the city who can challenge Yerin or Naru Saeya.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan spent his childhood learning how to restrict his physical senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Fury has a grin similar to Eithan's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan uses pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan can manifest blue-white stars of Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan has Forged stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan's Forged stars dissipate back into aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon wishes he were standing with Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan has elaborately ornamented sleeves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan Arelius is ranked sixty-fourth in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan is designing a flying fortress for the Ninecloud Soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan is part of the Blackflame team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan redirected a stream of water madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan was dissolved into white light during the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan emerged at the edge of the jungle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan uses an Archlord sacred dagger that can change its physical shape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan's scissors carry an Archlord binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan's scissors respond well to Enforcement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan wears gold-and-lavender outer robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan waited in a booth for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan Arelius is of the Blackflame Empire and a chosen of Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan is Veris Arelius's cousin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan finds the Monarch eating grilled vegetables in an alley in Ninecloud City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan saluted the Ninecloud cleaning crew mentally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan is not good at consolations.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan was lounging in a padded chair in Lindon's room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan is Lindon's teacher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan is participating in a competition and has been instructed to prepare to fight tomorrow morning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan has spent much of his life in the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan wears gray fighting robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan is a teacher who told his students he wouldn't hold back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan uses the Hollow King's Crown technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan uses the Empty Palm technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan possesses a stopwatch device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan was under the protection of Malice and Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Saeya suggests Lindon and Eithan should join her if they can slip away from Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan insisted Lindon and Yerin meet at the restaurant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan has not been seen by Lindon at any of the matches this week.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan wears bright ocean-shaded robes during the ceremony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan's signature would look the same as Mercy's due to Akura Malice's shadow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Watching Eithan fight has given Lindon thoughts about the direction he could take his own pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan gathered with Yerin and Mercy at the end of the cloudship dock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan is a character who watched Lindon and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan has temporary access to the technique library.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan's Overlord revelation is that he is one who sees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan uses soulfire to refine and strengthen himself during advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan's advancement to Overlord is less dramatic than the leap to Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan provided perception training to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan told Yerin he does not see the Sage potential in her yet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan Arelius uses cycling madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Charity intends to relay Lindon's greetings to Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan is an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan's clothes were destroyed by destruction aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan uses a cloud condensed from aura around his waist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan Arelius is a member of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan Arelius is competing in an Akura vassal team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan offers to perform the Pure Storm Baptism for Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan was eliminated from the matches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan travels with Lindon, Mercy, and Fury into a pillar of darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan has a cloudship that is one of the fastest in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan spoke to Lindon about seeing himself as others saw him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan may have extended his pure madra to cover the cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan can drift down on a flow of wind aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan is able to wave people aboard a cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan gave Yerin dream tablets long ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Eithan's safety depends on Yerin winning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Eithan uses pressure as a focused weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Eithan was at Lindon's bedside when he woke up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Eithan questioned the ethics of whether a copy of Yerin is still Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan is a character mentioned in relation to Malice's plans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan dove and rolled close to the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan launched a Hollow King’s Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan uses soulfire and madra to fight against blood aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan uses the Hollow King’s Mantle to deflect a flying hawk of blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan is an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Eithan lay on the floor bleeding with ragged breathing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Eithan was on the cloudship dock with Lindon.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan gave Lindon assurances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan might be able to teleport one day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan is located below Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan wears a pink-and-purple outer robe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan is traveling with Lindon and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan owns a third of the island where Windfall is located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan has a territory on the island that includes a single tree and a hut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan timed the approach of the venomous presences.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan explains that Heralds focus their willpower inwardly to enhance their own power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan is with the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan believes Elder Rahm has a soul of steel and will not provide information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan found a clue while peering into the trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan noted the presence of grimy blankets and destroyed tools in a ruined building.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan addressed the Fallen Leaf School as brothers and sisters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan gave Lindon his Iron body, Blackflame Path, Jade cycling technique, and contract with Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan uses a green goop healing salve.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan notes that Sages can accomplish with authority whatever they could accomplish without it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan is a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan volunteered to secure Heaven’s Glory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan completed the Pure Storm Baptism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan Arelius travels on a dark blue one-person cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan Arelius's name means 'embodiment of impossible perfection' in his homeland.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan possesses Archlord soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan's soulfire is a dense flame of reflective chrome, like quicksilver imitating fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan was sent a message to prepare for the Wei clan's arrival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan feigned offense when addressed by Elder Rahm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan uses the Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan wears a turquoise outer robe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan stole a dream tablet from the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan lost his Golds at an inopportune moment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan has finite madra reserves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan is expected to join Lindon soon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan is staying in his house on the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan is an outsider to Lindon's home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan strode out of the messy blue light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — Eithan uses aura control to fly through the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan used his soulfire to heal himself and perform the Baptism on Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan Arelius claims to be a founding member of the Twin Star sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan Arelius claims to be a personal acolyte to the Sage of Twin Stars.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon does not feel Eithan's presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan is an Archlord and the figurehead of the Sect of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan initially objected to moving to the Blackflame Empire but then found the idea exciting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon intends to fulfill his obligation to Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan is referred to as the Uncrowned Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon kicked Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan Arelius is a character mentioned by Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan is a character who provides advice to the fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan has been stuck at Underlord for many years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan Arelius is a potential hostage to force Yerin Arelius's cooperation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan can manifest a ball of madra between his fingers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan has short hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan normally changes his clothes at least twice a day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan is an Archlord with no dream abilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan grabbed Lindon's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan believes someone modified the labyrinth's function with intention.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan threw an arm around Lindon and walked with him into the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan possesses a marble that contains darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan cleared his throat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan is weak against Enforcer techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan is weak against fine imported silk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan is a genius Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan is looking into the darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan indicated that the chamber is a way through.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin expected to sense Eithan in the area.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan uses concentrated Striker techniques to eradicate hunger madra strands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan wears fine pink-and-blue silks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan uses the Hollow Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan can drop stars of pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan blasted a trident from the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Eithan appeared in front of Lindon and Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan projected the Hollow Spear technique from his scissors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan's armor is dissolving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan has Icons that almost formed during his fight with Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — If manifested fully, Eithan's Icons would have made him a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan is waiting for the Joy Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan does not want to manifest the same Icons as Ozmanthus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan paced back and forth in the hallway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan called back regarding the exit opening.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan theorized that the labyrinth could not lock them in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Eithan notes the presence of the Eight-Man Empire and Dreadgod cults.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan can be consumed to borrow his bloodline legacy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan is a peer to Sages and Heralds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan Arelius is a character mentioned by Kahn Mala.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Eithan is restricted by oath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Eithan was walking with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Eithan can move at Archlord speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Eithan saw a shadow of himself ascending to Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Eithan spoke wistfully about the majesty of soul oaths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan reveals he has been holding a black marble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan possesses the power of the Reaper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan has the vision of the Hound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan was once declared the heir of the Spider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan's strength has faded due to staying under the Origin Shroud for a long time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan's full name is Ozmanthus Tiberian Mereithan Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan's mother called him Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan was once Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan stopped a cosmic attack with the palm of his hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan is a member of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan Arelius was seen in a vision within Eithan's marble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan Arelius's role in the cosmos was to put down worlds that were too sick to go on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan Arelius abandoned his mission to attempt to raise up people who could replace him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Malice identified the figure she saw as Eithan Arelius.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan's house on Windfall is minimal and sparsely furnished.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan left a bottle labeled 'For Lindon’s hair' in his hut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan has undergone a forced ascension.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon has spent time with Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan has ascended into the heavens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan has a garden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan demonstrated world-shaking power and then vanished.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan Arelius is the same person as Ozmanthus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan revealed himself as a heavenly messenger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel attempts to act like Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan left scales behind for Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan Arelius is a prominent and powerful figure among the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan's plans are a concern to Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan fought a mysterious enemy in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan is mentioned by Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan is someone Lindon compares Dross's comments to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon thinks Eithan might be able to hear Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan noted that the Titan is known for its inevitability rather than its speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan Arelius blinded Malice's ability to look into the future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan Arelius has ascended.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Eithan liberated a Soulforge from Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Larian's grin makes her look uncomfortably like Eithan Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Eithan Arelius has brought chaos to the world.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — The eighth opening was Eithan's original creation and represented the height of his Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Reigan Shen wished he had known who Eithan was.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan Arelius left his apprentice a weapon capable of killing Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan's echo might be tapping into the labyrinth's memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan has used black armor in battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan's attacks are described as clean, cold, and absolute.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan has apprentices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon noted that Ozmanthus was still Eithan in many ways.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan is a blonde, smiling, well-dressed opponent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan used spoons to slash open Little Blue's Hollow Domain and nudge Orthos off-course.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — The battle between Orthos and Eithan was a simulation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan has been seen erasing stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — The projection of Eithan is from when he was at Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan defeated a veiled Monarch in nine seconds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan created a cave thousands of years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin mentioned Eithan to the Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan is mentioned as someone the Oracle Sage compares others to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan once adopted Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Eithan helped Cladia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan rose to defend the world from a black sky event.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Dross attributes Yerin's arrogance to Eithan's influence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin has a memory of Eithan in black armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Eithan is a person who has had recent experience dodging shots from Tal’gullour.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Eithan is a person Ozriel wants to be.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Eithan is the Reaper of Worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan performs absolute strikes against enemies in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Eithan is associated with an attack Yerin has been working on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Yerin intends to get Eithan to fix the portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Eithan is a person Yerin knows who has the ability to wipe out stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Eithan is a Judge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Eithan is not in his peak condition due to a recent brush with death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Eithan is not on the other side of the rift Lindon opened.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Lindon worried that Eithan might have been imprisoned by the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Eithan sent Fury to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Eithan is a celestial executioner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Eithan has white hair and wears black armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Eithan considers Lindon's home to be his own.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan is currently in the labyrinth with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Eithan carries the anger, sadness, and pride that Ozmanthus carried.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan's body is broken, bruised, and blood-caked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan Arelius let Yan Shoumei go from Sky's Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan Arelius holds a title related to divine skill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan Arelius has fought a man who blotted out the stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan is Mercy's superior in the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan believes he will give Mercy the Silent King's bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan complained about the lack of materials Lindon used for his bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan could resolve the problem in seconds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan's hair is pure white instead of blond.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan wears sleek, black armor from the neck down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan is now Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael's actions prevent Lindon from reaching Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan believes a victory by Lindon would cause the Vroshir to withdraw.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan has white hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan remodeled the interior of the Grave with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan claims to be the greatest craftsman in all the worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan can tear open a sapphire hole in reality to travel through the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan's fragment was a featureless glob containing water, earth, and microscopic life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan advised Lindon to let the Way handle the rest of the creation process.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan Arelius's name ends in '-iel'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan is Lindon's adopted brother.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
